title: Small Business Raku Vase Reveal
description: Pinterest-aesthetic Turkish creator presenting a handmade raku ceramic vase in a gallery-wall bedroom — clean plate 9:16 still for CapCut editing.

prompt.concept: Pinterest-aesthetic Turkish creator captured in a single still frame, excitedly presenting a small handmade ceramic vase to the camera like a real content creator doing a small business product reveal. She holds the tiny vase up at chest-to-chin height with both hands cradling it gently, eyes bright with genuine excitement, lips parted in a soft 'oh my god look at this' smile. Her bedroom wall behind her is filled with a curated gallery of art posters, anchored by a large Japanese typography poster reading 楽 (raku) in elegant ink brush calligraphy. Clean plate composition with negative space around her so text, prices, or icons can be added later in CapCut.

format.platform_look: Instagram Reels still / TikTok cover / Pinterest pin

character.ethnicity: Turkish, Mediterranean features but with a fair complexion
character.hair: long, loose beach waves, warm auburn-brown (kumral) with honey and caramel highlights catching the light, soft middle part, slightly tousled, flowing down past the shoulders, NO headband, NO bandana, NO hair accessory — hair worn completely free and natural
character.skin: fair-light complexion with a subtle golden sun-kissed tan — like someone who spent a weekend at the beach, slightly bronzed across the nose, cheeks and shoulders but clearly naturally fair-skinned underneath, dewy 'clean girl' makeup, soft peachy blush across the cheeks, glossy nude-pink lip, subtle warm bronzer along cheekbones, fluttery natural lashes, no heavy contour
character.eyes: warm hazel-brown, bright and lively, eyes slightly widened with genuine excitement, direct contact with the camera
character.expression: excited, delighted, soft 'wow look at this' smile with lips slightly parted, eyebrows softly raised in genuine wonder, a hint of a real laugh about to escape — authentic enthusiasm, not performative
character.vibe: Pinterest 'that girl' / sun-kissed Mediterranean / clean aesthetic, golden-hour glow

wardrobe.top: relaxed-fit navy blue button-up shirt in a rich deep navy tone (around #1B2A4E to #243B6B), soft cotton or lightweight linen-cotton blend with a natural slight texture, top one or two buttons left undone in a casual unbuttoned way revealing the collarbone, collar softly popped or laying naturally, sleeves rolled up to the forearm — completely plain, absolutely no logos, no text, no prints, no patterns, no embroidery
wardrobe.necklace: dainty thin gold chain with a single small sun pendant — a stylized sun charm with a round center disc surrounded by short radiating sun rays, pendant rests softly at the base of the collarbone where the unbuttoned shirt opens, catches the natural window light with a warm gold glint, the navy shirt makes the gold sun pop beautifully
wardrobe.bracelet: a delicate layered gold bracelet set on her wrist — two or three thin dainty gold chain bracelets stacked together, one with tiny hammered disc charms, one a simple fine snake chain, catching the light as she holds the vase, complementing the gold sun necklace and earrings
wardrobe.additional_jewelry: small gold hoop earrings just visible through the hair, one thin gold ring and a delicate gold band stack on her fingers — kept minimal so the sun necklace remains the clear focal accessory
wardrobe.nails: short almond shape, milky-white or soft chrome polish

product_in_hand.item: small handmade ceramic vase, miniature scale — roughly the size of her palm, about 10-12 cm tall
product_in_hand.style: wabi-sabi raku-style pottery, organic hand-thrown silhouette with a slightly uneven rim and gentle finger-shaped indentations, bulbous bottom tapering to a slim neck
product_in_hand.glaze: matte cream-white base with natural raku crackle pattern, soft smoke-grey and warm terracotta blush along one side where the kiln kissed it, subtle metallic copper flecks catching the light
product_in_hand.texture: visibly handmade — you can see the slight throwing rings, the imperfect symmetry, the artisanal warmth
product_in_hand.how_she_holds_it: both hands cradling it gently — one hand cupped underneath the base for support, the other lightly wrapped around the body with fingers softly splayed, vase held up at chest-to-chin height, tilted very slightly toward the camera so the glaze and crackle texture are clearly visible, gold bracelet visible on the wrist of the hand wrapped around the vase
product_in_hand.scale_emphasis: the smallness of the vase is part of the charm — it should look genuinely tiny and precious in her hands

pose_and_body_language.overall: natural influencer posture mid-reveal — looks like a real content creator doing a small business haul, not a model holding a studio pose. Shoulders relaxed and slightly forward as she leans in toward the camera with her find. Subtle weight shift onto one hip creating a soft S-curve through the torso.
pose_and_body_language.lean: leaning forward just a touch from the waist, like she can't wait to show you, creating natural engagement with the lens
pose_and_body_language.hands: both hands occupied with the vase — one cradling the base, one softly wrapped around the body, fingers relaxed and natural, no stiffness, no white-knuckle grip, gold bracelets catching the light on her wrist
pose_and_body_language.chin: chin slightly tilted down and angled a few degrees off-center for a flattering angle, eyes still looking directly at the lens with bright excitement
pose_and_body_language.head: very slight, almost imperceptible head tilt to one side — adds to the 'oh my god isn't this cute' energy
pose_and_body_language.energy: genuine, warm, excited — the kind of candid moment you'd screenshot from a real Pinterest creator's small-batch haul reel

setting.location: her bedroom corner, transformed into a Pinterest-curated poster gallery wall
setting.wall_treatment: the wall behind her is densely decorated with a curated collage of framed and unframed art posters arranged in an organic, layered gallery-wall style — overlapping slightly in places, varied in size and orientation, all in a cohesive warm-neutral palette
setting.hero_poster: a large prominent Japanese typography poster centered behind and slightly above her shoulder, featuring the single kanji character 楽 (raku, meaning 'comfort, ease, pleasure' — also the name of the pottery tradition) rendered in bold elegant black sumi ink brush calligraphy on off-white washi paper, framed in a thin natural oak wood frame. The kanji should be rendered with authentic brush stroke texture — visible bristle marks, organic ink bleed, traditional shodo calligraphy style
supporting_posters: a botanical line-art print of a single pampas grass stem
a vintage-style minimal Bauhaus geometric composition in muted terracotta and sage
a small black-and-white film photograph of a hand-thrown pottery wheel mid-spin
an abstract watercolor wash in warm earth tones
a small minimal Japanese-inspired ensō circle in black ink
a typography print with a single word in a serif font, blurred and unreadable
a postcard-sized print of dried wildflowers
setting.frames: mix of thin natural oak, slim black metal, and a few unframed prints attached with small bulldog clips or washi tape — eclectic but curated, not chaotic
additional_details: small wooden floating shelf with a tiny ceramic figurine and a trailing pothos plant
a string of warm fairy lights softly draped along the top edge of the gallery wall creating gentle bokeh dots
soft daylight from camera-left creating a gentle gradient across the poster wall
warm beige and off-white base wall paint visible in small gaps between posters
setting.depth: the poster wall is softly blurred but still clearly readable as a gallery wall — the 楽 raku kanji poster should remain legible and recognizable even with the background blur

camera.shot: medium close-up, chest up to slightly above the head, shot from a slightly elevated angle — camera positioned about 15-20 degrees above eye level looking down at her
camera.angle: slightly high angle (above eye level) — this creates a more dynamic, engaging composition, makes her eyes appear larger and more expressive, adds a flattering perspective, and creates visual hook by breaking the typical eye-level selfie look. The downward angle also naturally draws the viewer's eye from her face down to the vase she's presenting.
camera.lens_feel: iPhone rear camera aesthetic held by a friend from slightly above, natural shallow depth of field, mild background blur — enough to soften the posters but not so much that the raku kanji becomes unreadable
camera.focus: sharp on her face AND the ceramic vase she's holding — both should be in clear focus since the vase is the product reveal. Poster wall softly blurred but the large 楽 kanji poster still legible.
camera.headroom: leave clean negative space around the vase for text, price tags, or product info to be added later in editing — the poster wall should not feel crowded around her face
camera.composition: shot from slightly above, her face occupies the upper-center area looking up at the camera with warm eyes, the ceramic vase sits in the lower-center of the frame at chest height, the 楽 raku poster is visible on the wall behind her — the high angle creates a natural visual flow from her face to the vase, making it feel like a peek into a real moment

lighting.key: soft natural window light from camera-left, golden hour warmth wrapping around her face and catching the curves of the ceramic vase, highlighting her subtle sun-kissed tan
lighting.fill: subtle bounce from a white wall on camera-right softening any shadows
lighting.mood: warm, glowy, airy, no harsh shadows, dewy skin highlights on fair sun-kissed skin, navy shirt deepens beautifully in the warm light
lighting.color_temp: around 4500K with a gentle golden tint
lighting.highlight_note: light creates a subtle sparkle on the gold sun pendant and wrist bracelets against the navy shirt, beautifully reveals the raku crackle texture and metallic flecks on the ceramic vase, warms the off-white washi paper of the 楽 poster in the background, and enhances the natural bronzed glow on her nose and cheeks

no_text_no_graphics.on_screen_text: NONE on the foreground — no captions, no UI overlays
no_text_no_graphics.background_text_allowed: the 楽 (raku) kanji on the background poster IS allowed and intentional
no_text_no_graphics.note: deliver a clean plate — all foreground text, icons, prices, and graphics will be added later in CapCut

negative_prompt: any pendant that is not a sun
dark olive or deep tan skin
very dark brown or black hair
Chinese characters instead of Japanese kanji
